3337280.name: Tony's Creepy Crawly Zoo 2.0
3337280.description:
Step into the captivating world of Tony's Creepy Crawly Zoo 2.0, where science and adventure collide! This immersive VR experience lets you explore a vibrant insect science museum filled with live insects and reptiles in stunning macro detail. Shrink to their scale and discover the intricate beauty of their world like never before.

The experience also includes a special room showcasing the legendary Dan Capps Exhibit, one of the world's most extensive insect collections, with over 100 meticulously curated display cases. In this immersive exhibit, experience video recordings of Dan Capps himself, as he pops up throughout the room to guide you through the fascinating world of entomology. Whether you’re marveling at the intricacy of insect anatomy or learning about the rare species Dan has collected, this experience brings the hidden wonders of nature right to your fingertips.

Perfect for science enthusiasts and curious explorers, this immersive experience offers an unforgettable introduction to the rich biodiversity of our planet’s insects and reptiles—all from the comfort of your own space.
3337280.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
